diagrams.title: Space-Time Diagram with Consistent Cut
diagrams.description: Shows three processes P1, P2, P3 with events and messages. A zigzag cut separates past from future. Messages m1 and m2 are in the past of the cut (both send and receive included), while m3 crosses from future to past (inconsistent if included).
elements: Vertical lines for P1, P2, P3
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the concept of consistent vs inconsistent cuts and how messages relate to global states

diagrams.title: Chandy-Lamport Marker Propagation
diagrams.description: Shows initiator P1 sending markers to P2 and P3. Arrows show marker flow. Process states recorded when first marker arrives. Channel states captured as messages arriving after marker.
diagrams.purpose: Understand how the snapshot algorithm propagates and captures states

diagrams.title: Channel State Capture in Chandy-Lamport
diagrams.description: Detailed view of one channel during snapshot. Messages sent before marker = in-transit (captured). Messages sent after marker = not in snapshot.
diagrams.purpose: Clarify how in-transit messages are identified and captured
